column1: A single continuous five-second medium close-up in a modern living room. A man sits on a sofa facing the camera while a soccer match plays quietly on the television behind him. At about 0.3 seconds, he begins speaking and continues naturally until near the end of the shot. His face remains clearly visible, with continuous synchronized lip movement and no long pauses. <S>I waited all day for this match, and now our team might finally win.<E> Stable locked camera, natural facial motion, no cuts. <AUDCAP>Foreground: one continuous clear male utterance covering almost the entire clip. Background: low-volume soccer crowd and one soft referee whistle. No television commentary and no overlapping voices.<ENDAUDCAP>

A single continuous five-second medium close-up on a quiet park path at sunset. A man has just stopped running and faces the camera while breathing naturally. At about 0.3 seconds, he begins speaking and continues until near the end, without a long pause. <S>I finished the last hill, and now the sunset makes the whole run worthwhile.<E> Stable camera, subtle breathing and facial movement, no cuts. <AUDCAP>Foreground: continuous clear male speech with light natural breathing. Background: soft wind, distant birds, and faint footsteps settling to a stop. No other people speaking and no music.<ENDAUDCAP>

A single continuous five-second medium close-up in a small recording studio. A musician holds an acoustic guitar and faces the camera. He lightly touches the strings, then begins speaking at about 0.3 seconds and continues until near the final frame. <S>I tuned every string carefully, and this guitar finally sounds clear and balanced.<E> Locked camera, clearly visible face and lips, no cuts or long pauses. <AUDCAP>Foreground: one continuous clear male utterance. Background: one very soft acoustic guitar chord that does not cover the speech. No singing, no music track, and no other voices.<ENDAUDCAP>
